title_descriptor: Aramid Fabric, 93% meta Aramid 5% para Aramid 2% Carbon , 260 gr/m'2
page_title: Aramid Fabric, 93% meta Aramid 5% para Aramid 2% Carbon , 260 gr/m'2 - Aramid D2 260 - Ariteks
spec_line: 260 g/m², 93% m-Aramid 5% p-Aramid 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant, Antistatic, 3/1S Twill Fabric Aramid twill fabric
description_blocks: for wildland firefighters, oil and gas industry workers.
Inherent flame retardant fabric with EN ISO 11612 and EN ISO 11611 certification.
Protection against thermal hazards of electrical arc. (EN 61482-1-2)
Resistant to most industrial chemicals. (EN ISO 13034)

images.title: Protection Technical Textiles
images.context_text: High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.

images.title: Aramid D2 260
images.context_text: Aramid twill fabric consisting of 260 g/m², 93% m-Aramid, 5% p-Aramid, 2% Carbon. Inherent flame retardant fabric for wildland firefighters, oil and gas industry workers. Inherent flame retardant fabric with EN ISO 11612 and EN ISO 11611 certification. Antistatic (EN 1149-3) Protection against thermal hazards of electrical arc. (EN 61482-1-2) Resistant to most industrial chemicals. (EN ISO 13034)

Technical Parameters Fiber 93% m-Aramid (m-AR) 5% p-Aramid (p-AR) 2% Carbon(CF) EN ISO 2076 Yarn Warp:30/2Ne; Weft:30/2Ne EN ISO 2060 Weight 260 ±5 g/m² EN ISO 3081 Width 1600 ±20 mm EN ISO 3932 Tensile Strength Warp > 1500N; Weft > 1000N EN ISO 13934-1 Tear Strength Warp>70N ; Weft>60N EN ISO 13937-2 Dimensional Change -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% EN ISO 5077 Rubbing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 C06 Dry Cleaning Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N01 Peroxide Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N02 Hot Press Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X11 Light Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 B02 Perspiration Light Fast. 4-5 EN ISO 105 B07 pH 6.0 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants. EN ISO 14362-1 Application Firefighters Costumes Quality Management Done ISO 9001 Flame and Heat Protection Yes EN ISO 11612 Welding Protection Yes EN ISO 11611 Antistatic Yes EN ISO 1149-5 Arc Protection Class 1 (4kA) EN ISO 61482-1

text_blocks.text: High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics. Protection Technical Textiles
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
260 g/m² , 93% m-Aramid 5% p-Aramid 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant, Antistatic, 3/1S Twill Fabric

Aramid twill fabric consisting of 260 g/m², 93% m-Aramid, 5% p-Aramid, 2% Carbon. Inherent flame retardant fabric for wildland firefighters, oil and gas industry workers. Inherent flame retardant fabric with EN ISO 11612 and EN ISO 11611 certification. Antistatic (EN 1149-3) Protection against thermal hazards of electrical arc. (EN 61482-1-2) Resistant to most industrial chemicals. (EN ISO 13034) Technical Parameters Fiber 93% m-Aramid (m-AR) 5% p-Aramid (p-AR) 2% Carbon(CF) EN ISO 2076 Yarn Warp:30/2Ne; Weft:30/2Ne EN ISO 2060 Weight 260 ±5 g/m² EN ISO 3081 Width 1600 ±20 mm EN ISO 3932 Tensile Strength Warp > 1500N; Weft > 1000N EN ISO 13934-1 Tear Strength Warp>70N ; Weft>60N EN ISO 13937-2 Dimensional Change -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% EN ISO 5077 Rubbing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 C06 Dry Cleaning Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N01 Peroxide Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N02 Hot Press Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X11 Light Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 B02 Perspiration Light Fast. 4-5 EN ISO 105 B07 pH 6.0 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants. EN ISO 14362-1 Application Firefighters Costumes Quality Management Done ISO 9001 Flame and Heat Protection Yes EN ISO 11612 Welding Protection Yes EN ISO 11611 Antistatic Yes EN ISO 1149-5 Arc Protection Class 1 (4kA) EN ISO 61482-1-2 ATPV > 12 cal/cm² EN ISO 61482-1-1 Chemical Resistant Yes EN ISO 13034 Forest Firefighters Yes EN ISO 15614 Technical Documents >> Aramid D2 260 Data Sheet Certificates EN ISO 11612 EN ISO 11612 Test Report EN ISO 1149-5 (1149-3 Method 2) EN ISO 1149-5 (1149-3 Method 2) Test Report EN 61482-1-1 ATPV EN ISO 105 B02 EN ISO 105 C06 EN ISO 105 E04 EN ISO 105 N01 EN ISO 105 N02 EN ISO 105 X11 EN ISO 105 X12
